creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Greetings!

There seems to be an error in the plist, at least in pkg-plist.amd64
(possible in pkg-plist.i386 too?):

> DOCS=on
> NLS=on
...8<---
> ===>  Building package for linux-c7-gdk-pixbuf2-2.36.5
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/linux-c7-gdk-pixbuf2/work/stage/compat/linux/usr/share/doc/gdk-pixbuf2-2.36.5/COPYING:No such file or directory
> *** Error code 1
--->8...

There are only AUTHORS and NEWS in that directory.
COPYING is in stage/compat/linux/usr/share/licenses/gdk-pixbuf2-2.36.5/.

BTW: the license could be set: it is under “GNU Library General Public
License Version 2” according to COPYING.

Regards,
 Kalten
